query_normalized: transitlm: a large-scale dataset and benchmark for map-free transit route generation linguistics
rationale: The paper focuses on analyzing public transportation occupancy and undercrowding using APC data, which is an operational efficiency study, whereas the user's question concerns "map-free transit route generation" using Large Language Models (LLMs) and linguistics.
